title: The 50 Best Creator Posts About Pittsburgh Businesses
subtitle: TikToks made by Pittsburgh creators, ranked by plays. None of these came from the businesses themselves.
angle: the city is filming Pittsburgh businesses; the businesses are not posting back. Here's the proof, ranked.
intro:
Every quarter, Signal Pittsburgh pulls the top creator-made TikToks about local businesses by total plays. This spring, 44 different creators generated 248,077 plays across 50 videos, covering just 15 businesses. The math is clarifying: a lot of attention, concentrated hard.

The videos at the top of the list did not come from marketing departments. They came from a guy with a camera at Page's Dairy Mart in Arlington (@bhphotographypa, 62,800 plays), a first-timer figuring out she'd somehow missed Page's her entire life (@lilbigbackz, 22,900 plays), and a creator making an aesthetic Pittsburgh coffee guide who found her way to Margaux in East Liberty (@deluludayss, 21,400 plays). Not one of the 15 businesses featured in this quarter's top 50 produced any of these videos themselves. The city is doing the work.

That gap, between who is filming Pittsburgh and who is posting back, is the story we keep returning to. In Issue 02, we'll look at what happens when a business finally decides to show up.
